name: Employee Handbook
title: Employee Handbook
description: General rules, employee onboarding processes, and organizational code of conduct.
author: HR Division
content: Welcome to Pravesha AI! This handbook outlines employee benefits, working hours, leave policies, and code of conduct standard procedures. All employees are required to review this manual during onboarding. Standard operating parameters and core values (Aesthetics, Excellence, Integrity) guide our team operations.

name: CRM User Guide
title: CRM User Guide
description: Step-by-step user manual for counselor onboarding and managing student pipeline details.
author: Product Operations
content:
# Pravesha AI CRM Counselor Manual

This guide explains how to access leads, view student profiles, interact with Whatsapp message logs, and update status metrics. Follow up on overdue tasks within 24 hours to maximize student enrollment conversion probability.

name: Sales Process
title: Sales Process SOP
description: Standard sales counseling workflow sequence for course packaging and counseling closures.
author: Sales Director
content: Counseling Funnel: 1. Qualify lead requirements. 2. Offer course specializing roadmap. 3. Address fee structures. 4. Resolve price objections by highlighting job placements. 5. Process enrollment KYC.

name: Frequently Asked Questions
title: FAQ Catalog
description: Standard student FAQs covering payment plans, refund terms, and placement support queries.
author: Customer Success
content:
Frequently Asked Questions

Q: What payment installment plans are supported?
A: We support 3-month, 6-month, and annual billing installment options via credit/debit cards or Netbanking.

Q: Is there placement support?
A: Yes, we provide placement coaching, mock interviews, and resume reviews for all active students.

name: Product Catalog
title: Product Catalog & Course Details
description: Detailed curriculum, syllabus modules, and pricing models for all course programs.
author: Academic Board
content: Curriculum Modules: Full Stack Developer Program (8 months, ₹85,000), Data Science & AI Specialization (10 months, ₹1,20,000), Cyber Security Analyst Program (6 months, ₹75,000). All courses feature practical capstone projects and mentor interactions.

name: Support SOP
title: Support Standard Operating Procedures
description: Standard guidelines for support ticket routing, severity escalation, and SLA tracking.
author: Support Head
content: SLA Escalation Guidelines: Severity 1 (Critical) - Resolve within 4 hours. Severity 2 (Major) - Resolve within 12 hours. Severity 3 (Normal) - Resolve within 48 hours. Empathetic auto-reply should be triggered immediately on ticket creation.
